# Palbociclib 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Palbociclib 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Palbociclib</strong> 目前有 <strong>28 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Palbociclib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Ibrance is indicated for the treatment of hormone receptor (HR) positive, human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 (HER2) negative locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer:  in combination with...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>hyperthyroidism（99.4%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（99.4%）</li>
<li>thrombotic disease（99.3%）</li>
<li>resistance to thyroid hormone due to a mutation in thyroid hormone receptor beta（99.3%）</li>
<li>brachydactyly-syndactyly syndrome（99.0%）</li>
<li>myeloid leukemia（98.9%）</li>
<li>multiple endocrine neoplasia（98.9%）</li>
<li>colobomatous microphthalmia-rhizomelic dysplasia syndrome（98.8%）</li>
<li>hyperthyroxinemia（98.8%）</li>
<li>Prinzmetal angina（98.8%）</li>
<li>homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia（98.7%）</li>
<li>vein disease（98.5%）</li>
<li>thrombocytopenia（98.5%）</li>
<li>female breast carcinoma（98.4%）</li>
<li>Graves disease（98.3%）</li>
<li>marcothrombocytopenia with mitral valve insufficiency（98.3%）</li>
<li>hereditary thrombocytopenia with normal platelets（98.3%）</li>
<li>transient neonatal thrombocytopenia（98.2%）</li>
<li>plasma cell myeloma（98.2%）</li>
<li>dense granule disease（98.1%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/palbociclib/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
